title: Kengyilia laxiflora
taxonomy: Kengyilia laxiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Kengyilia, which is a group of grasses. The plant is native to the mountainous regions of Asia, specifically China and the Himalayas. Within the Poaceae family, Kengyilia laxiflora is classified as a type of grass, likely being a member of the subfamily Pooideae.
